tasks.title: Bug Lab: múltiplos file inputs diferenciados
tasks.description: Create page with 2+ distinct file inputs. Test that generated selectors differ per input (label/position/aria). Create bug_lab/pages/bug-multi-file-input/index.html and tests.

tasks.title: Bug Lab: select/options jQuery não capturados
tasks.description: Create page with jQuery-enhanced select. Test recording generates select_option(). Create bug_lab/pages/bug-jquery-select/index.html.

tasks.title: Bug Lab: datepicker sem validação
tasks.description: Create page with date input. Test date selection and validation. bug_lab/pages/bug-datepicker/index.html.

tasks.title: Bug Lab: encoding inconsistente
tasks.description: Create page with UTF-8 special chars (ç, ñ, é). Test recording preserves encoding. bug_lab/pages/bug-encoding/index.html.

tasks.title: Script de consolidação de artefatos para LLM
tasks.description: Create scripts/consolidate_artifacts.py that combines recordings/ + semantic_tests/ into single document for LLM analysis.

tasks.title: Pipeline CI: GitHub Actions workflow
tasks.description: Create .github/workflows/test.yml with matrix python 3.10-3.13. Run pytest on push/PR.

tasks.title: Generate consolidated bug fix report
tasks.description: Create bug_lab/REPORT.md listing every bug: did it exist? was it fixed? what was the fix? Include commit hashes. Show before/after test results.
